body.body: Training feedback currently uniform. Biological learning responds to sparse, unpredictable reward signals (dopamine spike on surprise). Add variable-ratio reinforcement signal to word-graph / memory training. Design first.
body.title: Sparse/unpredictable reward signals for training feedback
body.result: Implemented sparse reward signals via gradient_flatness as surprise scaler. Added surprise_scale(flatness) to WordGraph — pure function, gate IGOR_SURPRISE_REWARD_ENABLED (default off). Updated BG winner reinforcement: calls gradient_flatness(_score_text) + surprise_scale → boost=0.1*scale. Expected input (flatness≈0) → unchanged +0.1; novel input (flatness≈1) → up to +0.3. Forensic log at DEBUG when scale>1.5. Design doc at design_docs/issue-338.csb.txt. Variable-ratio schedule deferred (flatness magnitude covers the intent).
